mapper.select: SELECT o.* FROM order_room o JOIN room_participant rp ON rp.room_idx = o.room_idx WHERE rp.member_idx = #{memberIdx} AND rp.left_at IS NULL AND o.room_status IN ('OPEN', 'SELECTING', 'PAYMENT_PENDING') ORDER BY CASE o.room_status WHEN 'PAYMENT_PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'SELECTING' THEN 2 WHEN 'OPEN' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, o.updated_at DESC, o.room_idx DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM order_room WHERE expires_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
SELECT * FROM order_room WHERE created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL 1 DAY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_room( leader_member_idx, store_idx, selected_delivery_address_idx, room_code, order_mode, payment_mode, room_status ) VALUES ( #{leaderMemberIdx}, #{storeIdx}, #{selectedDeliveryAddressIdx}, #{roomCode}, #{orderMode}, #{paymentMode}, 'OPEN' )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_room SET selected_delivery_address_idx = #{selectedDeliveryAddressIdx}, order_mode = #{orderMode}, payment_mode = #{paymentMode}, room_status = 'SELECTING' WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx}
UPDATE order_room SET is_join_locked = FALSE, room_status = 'SELECTING', locked_at = NULL, expires_at = NULL WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx}
UPDATE order_room SET is_join_locked = FALSE, room_status = 'CANCELLED', locked_at = NULL, expires_at = NULL WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx}
UPDATE order_room SET room_status = 'ORDER_CONFIRMED', expires_at = NULL WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx}
UPDATE order_room SET room_status = 'CANCELLED', expires_at = NULL WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx}
UPDATE order_room SET room_status = 'EXPIRED', expires_at = NULL WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx}
UPDATE order_room SET room_status = 'EXPIRED', expires_at = NULL WHERE expires_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
